# Syringe Aesthetics

> Nurse-practitioner-owned med spa in East Dallas, TX, founded by Manuel Guillen, FNP-C. Known for facial balancing: treating the face as a whole with Botox and filler rather than one feature at a time. Also offers Sculptra, SKINVIVE, KYBELLA, and medical weight loss. Bilingual care in English and Spanish.

## Business
- Name: Syringe Aesthetics
- Founder & injector: Manuel Guillen, FNP-C (Family Nurse Practitioner, Certified); Instagram @dallastoxbarbie (13,000+ followers, verified)
- Signature approach: facial balancing (treating the face as a whole for proportion, not volume)
- Experience: 7+ years in aesthetic medicine
- Address: 1151 N Buckner Blvd Ste 408, Dallas, TX 75218 (East Dallas)
- Phone / Text: (214) 713-9693
- Languages: English, Spanish
- Hours: Mon 10:00am-4:00pm; Tue-Sat 10:30am-4:00pm; Sun by request

## Treatments
- Facial balancing: cheeks, chin, jawline, lips, and non-surgical nose planned together
- BOTOX Cosmetic: forehead lines, frown lines, crow's feet, platysma bands
- JUVEDERM dermal filler: cheeks, chin, temples (VOLUMA), jawline (VOLUX), lower facial lines (Ultra Plus, VOLLURE), undereye hollows (VOLBELLA)
- Non-surgical nose refinement (filler)
- Lip filler: JUVEDERM Ultra XC, VOLBELLA XC
- SKINVIVE by JUVEDERM: skin quality and hydration
- Sculptra: collagen stimulation and skin tightness
- KYBELLA: submental fullness (under the chin)
- Medical weight loss: semaglutide (GLP-1), medically supervised

## Booking
- Online: https://syringeaesthetics.myaestheticrecord.com/online-booking
- Text: (214) 713-9693
- Call: (214) 713-9693

## Notes
Syringe Aesthetics is an Alle Rewards-eligible provider for BOTOX Cosmetic and JUVEDERM products. Pricing is confirmed at consultation and not published, as every balancing plan is individual. All injectable and prescription treatments require an in-person consultation with Manuel Guillen, FNP-C.
